scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c auto "npm run dev --workspace @agent-foundry/api" "npm run dev --workspace @agent-foundry/worker" "npm run dev --workspace @agent-foundry/web"
scripts.dev:inline: concurrently -n api,web -c auto "RUN_WORKER_INLINE=true npm run dev --workspace @agent-foundry/api" "npm run dev --workspace @agent-foundry/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:scripts
scripts.clean: find apps packages -type d \( -name dist -o -name .next \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find apps packages -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -delete
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/contracts && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/domain && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/persistence && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/harness && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/model-router && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/executors && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/orchestrator && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/composition
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/api && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/worker && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/web
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run architecture:check && npm run roadmap:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.architecture:check: npm run lint:architecture && npm run architecture:test
scripts.roadmap:check: npm run roadmap:validate && npm run roadmap:test && npm run github-config:check && node scripts/render-roadmap.mjs --check
